rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (skill-resolved benchmark), shows where the draft drifts from it (the protocol delivers only an aggregated one), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast (Path A or Path B).
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for multiple clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the novelty claim needing to be either removed or precisely scoped.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., under-specified reference solution, potential circularity, and other issues listed).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
